pi_items.source: inject_references.py line 62, verified via web search and Supreme Court records. Case citation: 372 U.S. 335 (1963)
Web search confirms this is the correct Oyez.org URL for Gideon v. Wainwright. Case was argued in October 1962 (docket 155) and decided March 18, 1963.

Oyez.org provides oral argument transcripts, case summaries, and full opinions for Supreme Court cases. 'Oyez Transcript' is a generic but valid title for transcript content from Oyez. No contradictory evidence found.
Verified in verifier.py line 99-100 and export_result.sh line 63. LinkMode 3 represents 'Linked URI/URL' attachment type in Zotero/Jurism schema.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses the real landmark Supreme Court case Gideon v. Wainwright (372 U.S. 335, 1963), which is available on Oyez.org at https://www.oyez.org/cases/1962/155. The case involves the Sixth Amendment right to legal counsel and established that states must provide attorneys to indigent defendants in criminal proceedings. Users are instructed to attach a web link to this Oyez page with the title 'Oyez Transcript' using Jurism's 'Attach Link to URI' feature (linkMode 3).
